items.title: Cups
items.description: Emotions, relationships, intuition

items.title: Wands
items.description: Action, ambition, energy

items.title: Swords
items.description: Conflict, intellect, truth

items.title: Pentacles
items.description: Material world, work, wealth

items.title: Ace
items.description: Upright: New beginnings. Reversed: Delays, blocked potential.

items.title: Two
items.description: Upright: Balance, partnership. Reversed: Imbalance, tension.

items.title: Three
items.description: Upright: Growth, collaboration. Reversed: Conflict, delay.

items.title: Four
items.description: Upright: Stability, structure. Reversed: Stagnation.

items.title: Five
items.description: Upright: Conflict, change. Reversed: Resolution, avoidance.

items.title: Six
items.description: Upright: Harmony, recovery. Reversed: Regression.

items.title: Seven
items.description: Upright: Challenge, strategy. Reversed: Deception, confusion.

items.title: Eight
items.description: Upright: Movement, progress. Reversed: Delay, restriction.

items.title: Nine
items.description: Upright: Fulfillment, intensity. Reversed: Anxiety, dissatisfaction.

items.title: Ten
items.description: Upright: Completion, burden. Reversed: Release, failure.

items.title: Page
items.description: Upright: Learning, curiosity. Reversed: Immaturity, lack of progress.

items.title: Knight
items.description: Upright: Action, pursuit. Reversed: Impulsiveness, recklessness.

items.title: Queen
items.description: Upright: Mastery, nurture. Reversed: Manipulation, insecurity.

items.title: King
items.description: Upright: Authority, control. Reversed: Tyranny, imbalance.

items.title: The Fool
items.description: Upright: Beginnings, innocence, spontaneity. Reversed: Recklessness, naivety, poor judgment.

items.title: The Magician
items.description: Upright: Willpower, creation, skill. Reversed: Manipulation, illusion, wasted talent.

items.title: The High Priestess
items.description: Upright: Intuition, mystery, inner knowledge. Reversed: Secrets, disconnection, confusion.

items.title: The Empress
items.description: Upright: Fertility, growth, nurturing. Reversed: Dependence, stagnation, neglect.

items.title: The Emperor
items.description: Upright: Authority, structure, control. Reversed: Tyranny, rigidity, misuse of power.

items.title: The Hierophant
items.description: Upright: Tradition, belief, guidance. Reversed: Rebellion, dogma, restriction.

items.title: The Lovers
items.description: Upright: Union, choice, harmony. Reversed: Conflict, imbalance, misalignment.

items.title: The Chariot
items.description: Upright: Determination, victory, control. Reversed: Lack of direction, aggression.

items.title: Strength
items.description: Upright: Courage, patience, compassion. Reversed: Weakness, self-doubt.

items.title: The Hermit
items.description: Upright: Reflection, solitude, wisdom. Reversed: Isolation, withdrawal, loneliness.

items.title: Wheel of Fortune
items.description: Upright: Change, cycles, fate. Reversed: Bad luck, resistance to change.

items.title: Justice
items.description: Upright: Fairness, truth, accountability. Reversed: Bias, dishonesty, injustice.

items.title: The Hanged Man
items.description: Upright: Sacrifice, perspective, pause. Reversed: Stagnation, delay, avoidance.

items.title: Death
items.description: Upright: Transformation, endings, rebirth. Reversed: Resistance, stagnation.

items.title: Temperance
items.description: Upright: Balance, harmony, moderation. Reversed: Excess, imbalance.

items.title: The Devil
items.description: Upright: Bondage, addiction, materialism. Reversed: Freedom, release, awareness.

items.title: The Tower
items.description: Upright: Sudden upheaval, chaos, revelation. Reversed: Avoidance, delayed disaster.

items.title: The Star
items.description: Upright: Hope, healing, renewal. Reversed: Despair, lack of faith.

items.title: The Moon
items.description: Upright: Illusion, fear, subconscious. Reversed: Clarity, truth revealed.

items.title: The Sun
items.description: Upright: Success, joy, vitality. Reversed: Delay, temporary sadness.

items.title: Judgement
items.description: Upright: Awakening, reckoning, renewal. Reversed: Doubt, refusal to change.

items.title: The World
items.description: Upright: Completion, achievement, fulfillment. Reversed: Incompletion, delay.

items.title: Pride
items.description: Excessive belief in one’s own superiority

items.title: Greed
items.description: Insatiable desire for wealth or power

items.title: Wrath
items.description: Uncontrolled anger and vengeance

items.title: Envy
items.description: Resentment toward others’ success or possessions

items.title: Lust
items.description: Obsession with desire or pleasure

items.title: Gluttony
items.description: Overconsumption without restraint

items.title: Sloth
items.description: Avoidance of effort, apathy, or stagnation

items.title: Obsession
items.description: Fixation on a single idea or goal

items.title: Cruelty
items.description: Taking pleasure in suffering

items.title: Control
items.description: Need to dominate others or situations

items.title: Deceit
items.description: Habitual lying and manipulation

items.title: Ambition
items.description: Relentless pursuit of power at any cost

items.title: Despair
items.description: Loss of hope, spreading hopelessness to others

items.title: Corruption
items.description: Twisting purity into something darker

items.title: Indulgence
items.description: Constant surrender to impulses and excess

items.title: Nihilism
items.description: Belief that nothing has meaning or value

items.title: Domination
items.description: Desire to control and subjugate others completely

items.title: Humility
items.description: Freedom from pride and ego

items.title: Charity
items.description: Selfless love and compassion

items.title: Patience
items.description: Endurance without anger

items.title: Kindness
items.description: Active goodwill toward others

items.title: Temperance
items.description: Balance and self-restraint

items.title: Diligence
items.description: Persistence and dedication

items.title: Justice
items.description: Fairness and rightful balance

items.title: Mercy
items.description: Compassion over punishment

items.title: Faith
items.description: Unwavering trust in divine order

items.title: Hope
items.description: Inspiration and future promise

items.title: Wisdom
items.description: Deep understanding beyond knowledge

items.title: Purity
items.description: Freedom from corruption or distortion
